L. 88–376, § 178 Stat. 320This section is substituted for the source provision for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and executed words.

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: National Council on Radiation Protection and Measurements (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: b .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
